tables.title: AED Defibrillation by Age Group
rows: Adult pads (do not let pads touch)
AED with dose attenuator, then AED with adult pads

tables.title: AED Special Situations
rows: Move to dry area; wipe chest dry before pads
Place pad ≥1 in (2.5 cm) from the device
Remove patch, wipe skin, then apply pad
Press pads firmly; shave quickly if pads won't stick
Use AED normally — defibrillation is safe
Remove only if directly under a pad
